description: GSD workflow hooks -- session context loading, workflow enforcement, tool-use monitoring, and security defense-in-depth. Hook commands use an inline Node resolver so they fall back to the newest cached plugin version when the session's baked ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} path has been pruned after an upgrade.

hooks.command: node -e "const f=require('fs'),p=require('path'),o=require('os'),c=[];if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)c.push(p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT,'bin/gsd-tools.cjs'));const d=p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/gsd-plugin/gsd');try{for(const v of f.readdirSync(d).filter(x=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(x)).sort((a,b)=>{const A=a.split('.').map(Number),B=b.split('.').map(Number);return B[0]-A[0]||B[1]-A[1]||B[2]-A[2];}))c.push(p.join(d,v,'bin/gsd-tools.cjs'));}catch(e){}for(const x of c){if(!f.existsSync(x))continue;if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT&&x!==c[0])process.stderr.write('GSD: plugin path stale, using '+x+'\n');process.argv.splice(1,0,x);require(x);break;}" hook session-start

node -e "const f=require('fs'),p=require('path'),o=require('os'),cp=require('child_process'),c=[];if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)c.push(p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT,'hooks/gsd-session-state.sh'));const d=p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/gsd-plugin/gsd');try{for(const v of f.readdirSync(d).filter(x=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(x)).sort((a,b)=>{const A=a.split('.').map(Number),B=b.split('.').map(Number);return B[0]-A[0]||B[1]-A[1]||B[2]-A[2];}))c.push(p.join(d,v,'hooks/gsd-session-state.sh'));}catch(e){}for(const x of c){if(!f.existsSync(x))continue;if(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT&&x!==c[0])process.stderr.write('GSD: plugin path stale, using '+x+'\n');const r=cp.spawnSync('bash',[x],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status||0);}"
